description: Email client tool that supports multi-mailbox management and sending/receiving emails via a secure Cloudflare Worker proxy server (especially for Gmail).

localizedDescriptions.en: Email client tool that supports multi-mailbox management and sending/receiving emails via a secure Cloudflare Worker proxy server (especially for Gmail).
localizedDescriptions.zh: 支持多邮箱账号管理，支持通过 Cloudflare Worker 安全中转收发 Gmail、Outlook 等外网邮箱，附带完整的收信箱、写邮件与代理配置面板。

name: 邮箱工具
